seoTitle: Sunlands vs Sunnydale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sunlands and Sunnydale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sunlands and Sunnydale.
heading: Sunlands vs Sunnydale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sunlands, South Australia and Sunnydale, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sunlands has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Sunnydale (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sunlands or Sunnydale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sunlands has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Sunnydale scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sunlands scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Sunnydale scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sunlands or Sunnydale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sunlands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
